# Copilot Instructions — Acute Connect Monorepo

## Monorepo Structure Rules

This is a **Turborepo monorepo**. Always follow the three-layer rule:

- **`/apps`** — deployable applications that display things (compose modules + packages)
- **`/packages`** — shared reusable systems (no business logic, no app-specific code)
- **`/modules`** — business features (components, hooks, services, types, validation, routes)

## Do Not

- ❌ Do not put all logic inside one page or one component
- ❌ Do not duplicate auth, database, billing, or AI client instantiation — import from `@acmvp/auth`, `@acmvp/database`, `@acmvp/ai`, `@acmvp/billing`
- ❌ Do not create `import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'` anywhere except `packages/database/src/client.ts`
- ❌ Do not create new env var reads — always import from `@acmvp/config`
- ❌ Do not add hardcoded legal text, agreement versions, or staff email lists — they live in `@acmvp/config`

## Every Feature Module Must Have

```
modules/<name>/
  components/   ← UI components specific to this feature
  hooks/        ← React hooks for data/state
  services/     ← Supabase queries + business logic
  types.ts      ← local types (re-export from @acmvp/types as needed)
  validation.ts ← input validation (use Zod or the existing lib/validation.js patterns)
  routes.ts     ← route IDs owned by this module
  index.ts      ← public API (only export what consumers need)
```

## Package Import Conventions

```typescript
// ✅ Correct
import { supabase } from '@acmvp/database';
import { useAuth } from '@acmvp/auth';
import { Button, Field } from '@acmvp/ui';
import { LEGAL_VERSIONS, VALID_STAFF } from '@acmvp/config';
import type { Client, UserRole } from '@acmvp/types';

// ❌ Wrong
import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'; // creates a second client
import { supabase } from '../../supabase/supabase';   // old relative import
```

## Database Tables

Key table names (do not rename or hardcode elsewhere):
- Clients: `clients_1777020684735`
- CRN requests: `crn_requests_1777090006`
- Care centres: `care_centres_1777090000`
- Admin users: `admin_users_1777025000000`
- Audit logs: `audit_logs_1777090020`
- Profile audit: `profile_audit_log` (requires `legal_bundle_version` + `agreement_accepted`)
- Crisis events: `crisis_events_1777090008`
- Location instances: `location_instances`

## Audit & Consent

Always audit sensitive actions using `logActivity()` from `@acmvp/database`.
For user agreement tracking, use `recordAgreementAudit()` from `@acmvp/database`.

## TypeScript

- All new code in `packages/` and `modules/` must be TypeScript (`.ts` / `.tsx`)
- Import types with `import type { ... }` for type-only imports
- Use `strict: false` for now — we are incrementally migrating

## Testing

- Unit tests live in `/tests/unit/` and run with Vitest
- Match test files to the package they test: `tests/unit/auth/roles.test.ts` tests `packages/auth/src/roles.ts`
- E2e tests use Playwright in `/tests/e2e/`

## Deployment

- Web app deploys from `apps/web/dist` via Netlify
- Migrations run from `supabase/migrations/` via Supabase CLI in CI
- Do not modify `apps/web/dist` — it is always generated by the build
